findings.title: Paused verifier-backed loop lease can be replaced without parent authority token
findings.rationale: begin_ralph_loop_lease only enforces authority-token replacement checks when the existing lease is Active. Once a verifier-backed lease is paused, a child lane can call begin-loop-lease without CODEX1_PARENT_LOOP_AUTHORITY_TOKEN and mint a fresh parent authority token, bypassing the intended parent-owned replacement guard.
findings.suggested_next_action: Require matching parent loop authority for any existing verifier-backed lease (including paused), and add a regression test that begin-loop-lease fails without CODEX1_PARENT_LOOP_AUTHORITY_TOKEN after pause-loop-lease.
